1.main:
DEMO — Early Islam (sample seminar)

Write a short answer (8–15 sentences):
1) What is the Hijra and why does it matter for Muslim chronology?
2) Name one religion present in Arabia before Islam (besides Islam itself).

Criteria: factual accuracy, clear structure, no invented personal biographies.

2.main:
DEMO — Abbasid golden age (sample seminar)

In 10–20 sentences explain what is usually meant by the Abbasid «golden age» (Baghdad, translation movement, learning). Mention at least one concrete institution or practice.

Criteria: era/place awareness, concrete examples, balanced tone.

1.main:
DEMO — Napoleon in Egypt (sample)

From the perspective of a local observer critical of the French occupation, write a short speech (1 page max) about the gap between French claims of «enlightenment» and military conquest.

Criteria: historical context, coherent voice, argument not slogans only.

2.main:
DEMO — Pan-Islamism debate position (sample)

Choose the pan-Islamist position. Give two theses with arguments and short replies to «westernizers» and «Arabists». End with a 30–40 second oral pitch.

Criteria: clear stance, historical anchors (e.g. al-Afghani), debate readiness.
